pom.xml.general_idea: Update the Java version property from 8 to 21 to target the new JDK.
pom.xml.why_exists: The project will not compile or run on JDK 21 if the source/target compatibility remains set to 8, potentially causing class version mismatches or preventing usage of new language features.

pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade maven-compiler-plugin to a version compatible with Java 21.
pom.xml.why_exists: Older versions of the maven-compiler-plugin may fail to compile code targeting Java 21 or lack support for the required toolchains.

pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade Lombok dependency to a version compatible with Java 21.
pom.xml.why_exists: Older versions of Lombok may not support the internal APIs or bytecode structure of Java 21, leading to annotation processing failures or runtime errors.
